summary: Iteration 63: Full frontend verification of the new Showcase Section on landing page. All 5 AI-generated project examples display correctly with before/after images, real budgets, affiliate product links, and CTA buttons. Desktop and mobile views verified.
passed_tests: ✅ Room quick buttons visible (БАНЯ/ХОЛ/СПАЛНЯ/КУХНЯ/ДЕТСКА) with correct data-testids
✅ All 10 Before/After images load correctly from /showcase/ folder
✅ All 15 product links contain affiliate params (utm_source=temadom or ref=temadom)
✅ Main CTA 'ИЗБЕРИ ПОМЕЩЕНИЕ' button exists and navigates to /room-scan
✅ Mobile view (390px) shows showcase cards stacked vertically
✅ Mobile counter bar visible at bottom
critical_code_review_comments: 1. ✅ 5 room types: Bathroom (69 EUR), Living Room (89 EUR), Bedroom (79 EUR), Kitchen (99 EUR), Kids Room (69 EUR)
2. ✅ Each card has before/after images side-by-side with ПРЕДИ/СЛЕД AI labels
3. ✅ Real product data with names, prices, stores and affiliate URLs
4. ✅ All affiliate links contain tracking: utm_source=temadom or ref=temadom
5. ✅ Responsive design: Desktop shows 3-column grid, Mobile shows single column stack
6. ✅ All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
7. ✅ Images from /showcase/ folder load correctly (stock before + AI-generated after)
test_credentials: No auth required - Landing page is PUBLIC
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 verified the new Showcase Section on landing page. The section displays 5 real AI-generated room transformations with before/after images, budgets, and affiliate product links. All UI elements have correct data-testids. The 'after' images were generated by the AI 3D Designer endpoint. CTA buttons navigate to /room-scan?room={roomId} which requires authentication.
